name: The Exhumerator / Roz Kolora
affiliation: Shield Doncellas (Leader), GRATS (Ally), People of Pisces
physical: Leggy and tall, sensuous glamour. Uncombed red hair. Wears tight leather. Figaro-linked necklace with a royal blue shark fin guitar pick.
personality: Amused by synchronicity, vengeful, loyal to Manus (childhood love). Capable of extreme violence (exhuming hearts).
speech_style: Asks 'Is this the day you die?'.

knows: How to exhume hearts and keep them beating
does_not_know: How to prevent Yulania's initial storm transformation
